name: e-tady-dokotera

scripts.// scripts: Turborepo delegates these to each workspace's matching script
scripts.// test:integration: Spins up isolated postgres+redis containers, runs integration tests, then tears down
scripts.test:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && turbo test:integration && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down

// pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies: pnpm v10+ blocks postinstall scripts by default. This allowlist lets these packages run their build scripts (prisma: generates query engine, @nestjs/core: optional native optimizations, msgpackr-extract: compiles native msgpack bindings for BullMQ, esbuild: compiles native JS bundler binary for Vite).
